film.title: Ernest Goes to Jail
film.overview: Bumbling bank janitor Ernest P. Worrell is assigned to jury duty, and soon finds himself in trouble when he is covertly switched with a look-a-like crime boss. Ernest must escape from jail to expose the mix-up.

dialogues.dialogue: He promised he wasn't gonna do that.  Well... well, who cares what he thinks anyway?  I'm really proud of you for trying.  I mean, you're starting to take stock of yourself.  When you were in there talking to Mr. Pendlesmythe,
it was as if you were a whole different person.  What do you mean?  Well, I-I mean that I'm proud of you.  Ernest, do you have any idea  how long you've made me and Bobby wait in that van?
Ernest, I can't believe this.  This place is spotless.  I am so proud of you.  Has the value of pride diminished?  What?
This place is spotless.  I am so proud of you.  Has the value of pride diminished?  What?  Well, the last time you were proud of me,
Has the value of pride diminished?  What?  Well, the last time you were proud of me,  I got a kiss.  Mr. Pendlesmythe: Ernest, I want to see you in my office.
